message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "HostApp" as HostApp
participant "NanoRep" as NanoRep
participant "NSURLConnection" as NSURLConnection
participant "NSUserDefaults" as NSUserDefaults

HostApp -> NanoRep : (any request)

alt [Check if the session id is stored]
    NanoRep -> NSUserDefaults : fetch the session id
else [Send request for session id]
    NanoRep -> NSURLConnection : 
    NSURLConnection -[dotted] > NanoRep : session id from server
    NanoRep -> NSUserDefaults : store session id
    NanoRep -> NSURLConnection : keep alive request
    NSURLConnection -[dotted] > NanoRep : keep alive response
end

NanoRep -> NSURLConnection : (any request)
NSURLConnection -[dotted] > HostApp : response for the (any request)

@enduml
```
